acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

balanceOfBatch(address[],uint256[]).details: See {IERC1155-balanceOfBatch}. Requirements: - `accounts` and `ids` must have the same length.

params.shares: Burn this many long shares and short shares.

params.longRecipient: Who should receive the long shares                      (if 0x0, then `msg.sender` receives)
params.poolParams: The pool to mint shares from.
params.shares: The number of long and short shares to mint.
params.shortRecipient: Who should receive the short shares                       (if 0x0, then `msg.sender` receives)

endBounty((uint128,uint128,address,uint4.details: uncappedBountyFraction = block.timestamp > targetEndTimestamp + gracePeriod ? (block.timestamp - targetEndTimestamp - gracePeriod) * bountyFractionIncreasePerSecond : 0;bountyFraction = max(uncappedBountyFraction, maxBountyFraction)bounty = bountyFraction * collateral / 10**18;

returns._0: If any of the pools are already ended, then returns 0 for all bounties. Otherwise returns each bounty, quoted in the `payoutToken` of the pool.

endPool((uint128,uint128,address,uint48,.details: The pool must not have already ended.Can only be called at or after the pools target end timestamp.MUST emit a `PoolEnded` event.

fillOrder((address,address,uint48,addres.details: Emits a `TradeHistoryEvent` and a `VolumeAccountingEvent`.The order must not have already been filled.The order must not have been cancelled.The order must not have expired.The signature must be valid.

params.fraction: The fraction of the order to fill. Pass 1e18 to fill 100% of the order.

params.fractions: Pass 1e18 to fill 100% of the order.
params.signatures: The signature of the order maker.

returns._0: The hash of the order parameters.
The hash of the pool parameters.
True if the order has been cancelled, false otherwise

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.shortPoolParams: The pools to redeem short shares from.

params.shortParams: The pools to redeem short shares from.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.newIncreaseAmount: The new rate at which the bounty as a fraction of collateral increases per second

params.newGracePeriod: The new grace period, in seconds

params.newFeeBps: The new fee, in basis points

params.newMaxFraction: The new maximum bounty, as a fraction of the pool's collateral

params.newTreasury: The new address which receives the mint fees

(block.timestamp - targetEndTimestamp - gracePeriod) * bountyFractionIncreasePerSecond : 0;bountyFraction = max(uncappedBountyFraction, maxBountyFraction)bounty = bountyFraction * collateral / 10**18;

returns._0: If any of the pools are already started, then returns 0 for all bounties. Otherwise returns each bounty, quoted in the `payoutToken` of the pool.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner.

uri(uint256).details: See {IERC1155MetadataURI-uri}. This implementation returns the same URI for *all* token types. It relies on the token type ID substitution mechanism https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-1155#metadata[defined in the EIP]. Clients calling this function must replace the `\{id\}` substring with the actual token type ID.

params.shares: The amount of long and short shares to be burnt.

params.shortParams: The paramters of the pool to redeem short positions from.

bountyFractionIncreasePerSecond().notice: The rate at which the bounty as a fraction of collateral increases per second

bountyGracePeriod().notice: The grace period, in seconds, after the pool's target start & end times during which no bounties are paid

cancelOrders((address,address,uint48,add.notice: Cancels the given orders.The caller must be the maker of each order.

collateralRefund((uint128,uint128,addres.notice: Refunds mint collateral to the caller.The caller must have approved this contract to transfer their long and short shares.

collateralizedMint((uint128,uint128,addr.notice: Takes collateral from the caller, equal to the maximum payout:         (cap - floor) * shares         denominated in `SilicaPool.payoutToken`The caller must have approved this contract to transfer `SilicaPool.payoutToken`.

endBounty((uint128,uint128,address,uint4.notice: View function to estimate bounty for timely finalization of index tracking.

endPool((uint128,uint128,address,uint48,.notice: Ends the pool that matches the given parameters.Records the ending `ISilicaIndex` state for the pool.         Caller will be paid a bounty for each pool which was not         already ended if called after the grace period.

endPools((uint128,uint128,address,uint48.notice: Records the ending `ISilicaIndex` state for any of         the specified pools which have not already been ended.         Caller will be paid a bounty for each pool which was not         already ended if called after the grace period.Can only be called after pool's target end time.

fillFeeBps().notice: The fee, in basis points, for minting long and short shares

fillOrder((address,address,uint48,addres.notice: Fills the order with the given parameters.Transfers the collateral and mints the long and short tokens

fillOrders((address,address,uint48,addre.notice: Transfers all `offeredLongShares`, `offeredUpfrontAmount`,         `requestedLongShares`, `requestedUpfrontAmount` from/to         the appropriate parties         (`offered` should go from `order.maker` to `msg.sender`,         `requested` should go from `msg.sender` to `order.maker`).         If `order.taker != 0x0` the order is only fillable by `order.taker`.         This function SHOULD revert if any fill fails.         `UpfrontAmount`s SHOULD be transferred before any `LongShares` are minted,         to reduce the required allowance for minting `LongShares`.The caller must have approved this contract to transfer `requestedUpfrontToken`.If the order is private, the caller must be the taker.The input arrays must match in length.

fromLongTokenId(uint256).notice: Converts a long token ID to a pool hash.

fromShortTokenId(uint256).notice: Converts a short token ID to a pool hash.

maxBountyFraction().notice: The maximum bounty, as a fraction of the pool's collateral, that can be paid out

maxCollateralRefund((uint128,uint128,add.notice: Refunds mint collateral to the caller from the given pool.The caller must have approved this contract to transfer long and short shares.

orderCancelled(bytes32).notice: Indicates if a given order has been cancelled

pause().notice: Pause the protocol. Only callable by owner

poolState(bytes32).notice: Returns PoolState struct that matched the input hash

redeem((uint128,uint128,address,uint48,u.notice: Redeems shares for the payout token.The caller must have approved this contract to transfer their long and short shares.

redeemLong((uint128,uint128,address,uint.notice: Redeems shares for the payout token.

redeemShort((uint128,uint128,address,uin.notice: Redeems shares for the payout token.

startBounty((uint128,uint128,address,uin.notice: View function to estimate bounty for timely initialization of index tracking.

startPool((uint128,uint128,address,uint4.notice: Starts the pool that matches the given parameters.Records the starting `ISilicaIndex` state for any of         the specified pools which have not already been started.         Caller will be paid a bounty for each pool which was not         already started if called after the grace period.

startPools((uint128,uint128,address,uint.notice: Records the starting `ISilicaIndex` state for any of         the specified pools which have not already been started.         Caller will be paid a bounty for each pool which was not         already started if called after the grace period.Can only be called after pool's target start time.

toLongTokenId(bytes32).notice: Converts a pool hash to a long token ID.

toShortTokenId(bytes32).notice: Converts a pool hash to a short token ID.

treasuryAddress().notice: The address which receives the mint fees

unpause().notice: Unpause the protocol. Only callable by owner

viewMaxCollateralRefund((uint128,uint128.notice: View function to preview the amount that would be returned for calling `maxCollateralRefund()` function

viewRedeemLong((uint128,uint128,address,.notice: View function to preview the amount that would be returned for calling `redeemLong()` function.

viewRedeemShort((uint128,uint128,address.notice: View function to preview the amount that would be returned for calling `redeemShort()` function.
